API docs by Redocly

GROWI REST API v3 (7.2.0-RC.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:Download

Attachment

Get attachment list

Get attachment list

Authorizations:
api_key
query Parameters
pageId
required
string

page id

pageNumber
number
Example: pageNumber=1

page number

limit
number
Example: limit=10

limit

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/attachment/list

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "docs": [
    • {
      • "id": "5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
      • "_id": "5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
      • "__v": 0,
      • "attachmentType": "WIKI_PAGE",
      • "fileFormat": "text/plain",
      • "fileName": "601b7c59d43a042c0117e08dd37aad0aimage.txt",
      • "originalName": "file.txt",
      • "creator": {
        • "_id": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
        • "lang": "en_US",
        • "status": 0,
        • "admin": false,
        • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
        • "username": "alice",
        • "name": "Alice",
        • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
        },
      • "page": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
      • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      • "temporaryUrlExpiredAt": "2024-11-27T00:59:59.962Z",
      • "fileSize": 3494332,
      • "filePathProxied": "/attachment/5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
      • "downloadPathProxied": "/download/5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
      • "temporaryUrlCached": "https://example.com/attachment/5e0734e072560e001761fa67"
      }
    ],
  • "totalDocs": 1,
  • "limit": 20,
  • "totalPages": 1,
  • "page": 1,
  • "offset": 0,
  • "prevPage": null,
  • "nextPage": null,
  • "hasNextPage": false,
  • "hasPrevPage": false,
  • "pagingCounter": 1
}

/attachment/limit

Get available capacity of uploaded file with GridFS

Authorizations:
api_key
query Parameters
fileSize
required
number
Example: fileSize=23175

file size

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/attachment/limit

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "isUploadable": true
}

/attachment

Add attachment to the page

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema:
page_id
string
file
string <binary>

attachment data

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/attachment

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "page": {
    • "_id": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
    • "__v": 0,
    • "commentCount": 3,
    • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    • "creator": {
      • "_id": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
      • "lang": "en_US",
      • "status": 0,
      • "admin": false,
      • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
      • "username": "alice",
      • "name": "Alice",

      },

    • "grant": 1,

      • "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
      ],

      • "lang": "en_US",

      • "username": "alice",

      },

    • "revision": "string",

      • "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
      ],
    • "status": "published",
    • "updatedAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    },
  • "attachment": {
    • "id": "5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
    • "_id": "5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
    • "__v": 0,
    • "attachmentType": "WIKI_PAGE",
    • "fileFormat": "text/plain",
    • "fileName": "601b7c59d43a042c0117e08dd37aad0aimage.txt",
    • "originalName": "file.txt",
    • "creator": {
      • "_id": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
      • "lang": "en_US",
      • "status": 0,
      • "admin": false,
      • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
      • "username": "alice",
      • "name": "Alice",
      • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
      },
    • "page": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",

    • "filePathProxied": "/attachment/5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
    • "downloadPathProxied": "/download/5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
    • "temporaryUrlCached": "https://example.com/attachment/5e0734e072560e001761fa67"
    },
  • "revision": "string"
}

Get attachment

Get attachment

Authorizations:
api_key
path Parameters
id
required
string

attachment id

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/attachment/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "attachment": {
    • "id": "5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
    • "_id": "5e0734e072560e001761fa67",
    • "__v": 0,
    • "attachmentType": "WIKI_PAGE",
    • "fileFormat": "text/plain",
    • "fileName": "601b7c59d43a042c0117e08dd37aad0aimage.txt",
    • "originalName": "file.txt",
    • "creator": {
      • "_id": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
      • "lang": "en_US",
      • "status": 0,
      • "admin": false,
      • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
      • "username": "alice",
      • "name": "Alice",
      • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
      },

    }
}

Bookmarks

/bookmarks/info

Get bookmarked info

Authorizations:
api_key
query Parameters
pageId
string

page id

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/bookmarks/info

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "sumOfBookmarks": 0,
  • "isBookmarked": true
}

/bookmarks/{userId}

Get my bookmarked status

Authorizations:
api_key
path Parameters
userId
required
string

user id

query Parameters
page
number

selected page number

limit
number

page item limit

offset
number

page item offset

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/bookmarks/{userId}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "_id": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
  • "__v": 0,
  • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  • "page": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
  • "user": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
}

/bookmarks

Update bookmarked status

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
pageId
string

page ID

bool
boolean

boolean for bookmark status

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/bookmarks

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "pageId": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
  • "bool": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "_id": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
  • "__v": 0,
  • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  • "page": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
  • "user": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
}

BookmarkFolders

Create bookmark folder

Create a new bookmark folder

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
name
string

Name of the bookmark folder

parent
string

Parent folder ID

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/bookmark-folder

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "parent": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "bookmarkFolder": {
    • "_id": "string",
    • "__v": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "owner": "string",
    • "bookmarks": [

        • "_id": "string",

          }

      • { }
      ]
    }
}

Update bookmark folder

Update a bookmark folder

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
bookmarkFolderId
string

Bookmark Folder ID

name
string

Name of the bookmark folder

parent
string

Parent folder ID

Array of objects (BookmarkFolder)

Child folders

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/bookmark-folder

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

api_key
path Parameters
userId
required
string

Delete bookmark folder

Delete a bookmark folder and its children

Authorizations:
api_key
path Parameters
id
required
string

Bookmark Folder ID

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/bookmark-folder/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "deletedCount": 1
}

Update bookmark folder

Update a bookmark folder

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
pageId
string

Page ID

folderId
string or null

Folder ID

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/bookmark-folder/add-bookmark-to-folder

application/json

Page

/page

get page by pagePath or pageId

Authorizations:
api_key
query Parameters
pageId
string
Example: pageId=5e07345972560e001761fa63

page id

path
string
Example: path=/

page path

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/page

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "_id": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
  • "__v": 0,
  • "commentCount": 3,
  • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  • "creator": {
    • "_id": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
    • "lang": "en_US",
    • "status": 0,
    • "admin": false,
    • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
    • "username": "alice",
    • "name": "Alice",

    },
  • "extended": { },
  • "grant": 1,
  • "grantedUsers": [
    • "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
    ],
  • "lastUpdateUser": {
    • "_id": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
    • "lang": "en_US",
    • "status": 0,
    • "admin": false,
    • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
    • "username": "alice",
    • "name": "Alice",
    • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    },
  • "liker": [ ],
  • "path": "/",
  • "revision": "string",
  • "seenUsers": [
    • "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
    ],
  • "status": "published",
  • "updatedAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}

createPage

Create page

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
body
required
string

Text of page

path
required
string

page path

grant
number

grant

grantUserGroupId
string

UserGroup ID

Array of objects (Tag)
shouldGeneratePath
boolean

Determine whether a new path should be generated

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/page

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "body": "string",
  • "path": "/",
  • "grant": 1,
  • "grantUserGroupId": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
  • "pageTags": [
    • {
      • "_id": "5e2d6aede35da4004ef7e0b7",
      • "name": "daily",
      • "count": 3
      }
    ],
  • "shouldGeneratePath": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "page": {
      • "_id": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
      • "__v": 0,
      • "commentCount": 3,
      • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      • "creator": {
        • "_id": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
        • "lang": "en_US",
        • "status": 0,
        • "admin": false,
        • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
        • "username": "alice",
        • "name": "Alice",
        • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
        },
      • "extended": { },
      • "grant": 1,
      • "grantedUsers": [
        • "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
        ],
      • "lastUpdateUser": {
        • "_id": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
        • "lang": "en_US",
        • "status": 0,
        • "admin": false,
        • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
        • "username": "alice",
        • "name": "Alice",
        • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
        },
      • "liker": [ ],
      • "path": "/",
      • "revision": "string",
      • "seenUsers": [
        • "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
        ],
      • "status": "published",
      • "updatedAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
      },
    • "tags": [
      • [
        • "daily",
        • "report",
        • "tips"
        ]
      ],
    • "revision": {
      • "_id": "5e0734e472560e001761fa68",
      • "__v": 0,
      • "author": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
      • "body": "# test\n\ntest\n",
      • "format": "markdown",
      • "path": "/user/alice/test",
      • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
      }
    }
}

updatePage

Update page

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
body
required
string

content body

pageId
required
string

page ID

revisionId
required
string

revision ID

grant
number

grant

userRelatedGrantUserGroupIds
Array of strings
overwriteScopesOfDescendants
boolean

Determine whether the scopes of descendants should be overwritten

isSlackEnabled
boolean

Determine whether the page is enabled to be posted to Slack

slackChannels
string

Slack channel IDs

origin
string

Origin is "view" or "editor"

wip
boolean

Determine whether the page is WIP

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/page

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "body": "# test\n\ntest\n",
  • "pageId": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
  • "revisionId": "5e0734e472560e001761fa68",
  • "grant": 1,
  • "userRelatedGrantUserGroupIds": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "overwriteScopesOfDescendants": true,
  • "isSlackEnabled": true,
  • "slackChannels": "string",
  • "origin": "string",
  • "wip": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "page": {
      • "_id": "5e07345972560e001761fa63",
      • "__v": 0,
      • "commentCount": 3,
      • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",

        • "lang": "en_US",
        • "status": 0,
        • "admin": false,

        • "username": "alice",
        • "name": "Alice",
        • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
        },
      • "extended": { },
      • "grant": 1,
      • "grantedUsers": [
        • "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"

        • "lang": "en_US",

        • "admin": false,
        • "email": "alice@aaa.aaa",
        • "username": "alice",
        • "name": "Alice",
        • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
        },
      • "liker": [ ],
      • "path": "/",
      • "revision": "string",
      • "seenUsers": [
        • "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab"
        ],
      • "status": "published",
      • "updatedAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
      },
    • "revision": {

      • "__v": 0,
      • "author": "5ae5fccfc5577b0004dbd8ab",
      • "body": "# test\n\ntest\n",
      • "format": "markdown",
      • "path": "/user/alice/test",
      • "createdAt": "2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
      }
    }

renamePage

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
pageId
required
string

path
string

page path

revisionId
required
string

newPagePath
string

isRenameRedirect
boolean

whether redirect page

updateMetadata
boolean

whether update meta data

isRecursively
boolean

whether rename page with descendants

string

string

string

AdminHome

/admin-home

Get adminHome parameters

Authorizations:
cookieAuth

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/admin-home/

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "adminHomeParams": {
    • "growiVersion": "7.1.0-RC.0",
    • "nodeVersion": "20.2.0",
    • "npmVersion": "9.6.6",
    • "pnpmVersion": "9.12.3",
    • "envVars": {
      • "FILE_UPLOAD": "mongodb",
      • "APP_SITE_URL": "http://localhost:3000",
      • "ELASTICSEARCH_URI": "http://elasticsearch:9200/growi",
      • "ELASTICSEARCH_REQUEST_TIMEOUT": 15000,
      • "ELASTICSEARCH_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED": true,
      • "OGP_URI": "http://ogp:8088",
      • "QUESTIONNAIRE_SERVER_ORIGIN": "http://host.docker.internal:3003"
      },
    • "isV5Compatible": true,
    • "isMaintenanceMode": false
    }
}

AppSettings

/app-settings

get app setting params

Authorizations:
api_key

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/app-settings

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appSettingsParams": {
    • "azureReferenceFileWithRelayMode": false,
    • "azureUseOnlyEnvVars": false,
    • "confidential": "GROWI",
    • "envAzureClientId": "AZURE_CLIENT_ID",
    • "envAzureClientSecret": "AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET",
    • "envAzureStorageAccountName": "AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME",
    • "envAzureStorageContainerName": "AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NAME",
    • "envFileUploadType": "mongodb",
    • "envGcsApiKeyJsonPath": "GCS_API_KEY_JSON_PATH",
    • "envGcsBucket": "GCS_BUCKET",
    • "envGcsUploadNamespace": "GCS_UPLOAD_NAMESPACE",
    • "envSiteUrl": "http://localhost:3000",
    • "fileUpload": true,
    • "fileUploadType": "local",
    • "fromAddress": "info@growi.org",
    • "gcsApiKeyJsonPath": "GCS_API_KEY_JSON_PATH",
    • "gcsBucket": "GCS_BUCKET",
    • "gcsReferenceFileWithRelayMode": false,
    • "gcsUploadNamespace": "GCS_UPLOAD_NAMESPACE",
    • "gcsUseOnlyEnvVars": false,
    • "globalLang": "ja_JP",
    • "isAppSiteUrlHashed": false,
    • "isEmailPublishedForNewUser": true,
    • "isMaintenanceMode": false,
    • "isQuestionnaireEnabled": true,
    • "isV5Compatible": true,
    • "s3AccessKeyId": "string",
    • "s3Bucket": "string",
    • "s3CustomEndpoint": "string",
    • "s3ReferenceFileWithRelayMode": true,
    • "s3Region": "string",
    • "siteUrl": "string",
    • "siteUrlUseOnlyEnvVars": true,
    • "smtpHost": "string",
    • "smtpPassword": "string",
    • "smtpPort": "string",
    • "smtpUser": "string",
    • "useOnlyEnvVarForFileUploadType": true
    }
}

/app-settings/app-setting

Update app setting

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
title
string

title of the site

confidential
string

confidential show on page header

globalLang
string

global language

isEmailPublishedForNewUser
boolean

is email published for new user, or not

fileUpload
boolean

is file upload enabled, or not

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/app-settings/app-setting

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "GROWI",
  • "confidential": "GROWI",
  • "globalLang": "ja_JP",
  • "isEmailPublishedForNewUser": true,
  • "fileUpload": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appSettingParams": {
    • "title": "GROWI",
    • "confidential": "GROWI",
    • "globalLang": "ja_JP",
    • "isEmailPublishedForNewUser": true,
    • "fileUpload": true
    }
}

/app-settings/site-url-setting

Update site url setting

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
siteUrl
string

Site URL. e.g. https://example.com, https://example.com:8080

envSiteUrl
string

environment variable 'APP_SITE_URL'

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/app-settings/site-url-setting

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "siteUrl": "string",
  • "envSiteUrl": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "siteUrlSettingParams": {
    • "siteUrl": "http://localhost:3000"
    }
}

/app-settings/smtp-setting

Update smtp setting

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
smtpHost
string

host name of client's smtp server

smtpPort
string

port of client's smtp server

smtpUser
string

user name of client's smtp server

smtpPassword
string

password of client's smtp server

fromAddress
string

e-mail address

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/app-settings/smtp-setting

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "smtpHost": "smtp.example.com",
  • "smtpPort": "587",
  • "smtpUser": "USER",
  • "smtpPassword": "PASSWORD",
  • "fromAddress": "info@example.com"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "mailSettingParams": {
    • "isMailerSetup": true,
    • "smtpHost": "smtp.example.com",
    • "smtpPort": "587",
    • "smtpUser": "USER",
    • "smtpPassword": "PASSWORD",
    • "fromAddress": "info@example.com"
    }
}

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
from
string

transmissionMethod
string

sesAccessKeyId
string

sesSecretAccessKey
string

/app-settings/file-upload-setting

Update fileUploadSetting

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
fileUploadType
string

fileUploadType

s3Region
string

region of AWS S3

s3CustomEndpoint
string

custom endpoint of AWS S3

s3Bucket
string

AWS S3 bucket name

s3AccessKeyId
string

accesskey id for authentification of AWS

s3SecretAccessKey
string

secret key for authentification of AWS

s3ReferenceFileWithRelayMode
boolean

is enable internal stream system for s3 file request

gcsApiKeyJsonPath
string

apiKeyJsonPath of gcp

gcsBucket
string

bucket name of gcs

gcsUploadNamespace
string

name space of gcs

gcsReferenceFileWithRelayMode
boolean

is enable internal stream system for gcs file request

azureTenantId
string

tenant id of azure

azureClientId
string

client id of azure

azureClientSecret
string

client secret of azure

azureStorageAccountName
string

storage account name of azure

azureStorageContainerName
string

storage container name of azure

azureReferenceFileWithRelayMode
boolean

is enable internal stream system for azure file request

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/app-settings/file-upload-settings

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "fileUploadType": "string",
  • "s3Region": "string",
  • "s3CustomEndpoint": "string",
  • "s3Bucket": "string",
  • "s3AccessKeyId": "string",
  • "s3SecretAccessKey": "string",
  • "s3ReferenceFileWithRelayMode": true,
  • "gcsApiKeyJsonPath": "string",
  • "gcsBucket": "string",
  • "gcsUploadNamespace": "string",
  • "gcsReferenceFileWithRelayMode": true,
  • "azureTenantId": "string",
  • "azureClientId": "string",
  • "azureClientSecret": "string",
  • "azureStorageAccountName": "string",
  • "azureStorageContainerName": "string",
  • "azureReferenceFileWithRelayMode": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "responseParams": {
    • "fileUploadType": "string",
    • "s3Region": "string",
    • "s3CustomEndpoint": "string",
    • "s3Bucket": "string",
    • "s3AccessKeyId": "string",
    • "s3SecretAccessKey": "string",
    • "s3ReferenceFileWithRelayMode": true,
    • "gcsApiKeyJsonPath": "string",
    • "gcsBucket": "string",
    • "gcsUploadNamespace": "string",
    • "gcsReferenceFileWithRelayMode": true,
    • "azureTenantId": "string",
    • "azureClientId": "string",
    • "azureClientSecret": "string",
    • "azureStorageAccountName": "string",
    • "azureStorageContainerName": "string",
    • "azureReferenceFileWithRelayMode": true
    }
}

Update LDAP setting

Update LDAP setting

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
required
serverUrl
string

server url for ldap

isUserBind
boolean

enable user bind

ldapBindDN
string

the query used to bind with the directory service

ldapBindDNPassword
string

the password that is entered in the login page will be used to bind

ldapSearchFilter
string

the query used to locate the authenticated user

ldapAttrMapUsername
string

specification of mappings for username when creating new users

isSameUsernameTreatedAsIdenticalUser
boolean

local account automatically linked the user name matched

ldapAttrMapMail
string

specification of mappings for mail address when creating new users

ldapAttrMapName
string

Specification of mappings for full name address when creating new users

ldapGroupSearchBase
string

the base DN from which to search for groups.

ldapGroupSearchFilter
string

the query used to filter for groups

ldapGroupDnProperty
string

The property of user object to use in dn interpolation of Group Search Filter

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/security-setting/ldap

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "serverUrl": "string",
  • "isUserBind": true,
  • "ldapBindDN": "string",
  • "ldapBindDNPassword": "string",
  • "ldapSearchFilter": "string",
  • "ldapAttrMapUsername": "string",
  • "isSameUsernameTreatedAsIdenticalUser": true,
  • "ldapAttrMapMail": "string",
  • "ldapAttrMapName": "string",
  • "ldapGroupSearchBase": "string",
  • "ldapGroupSearchFilter": "string",
  • "ldapGroupDnProperty": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "serverUrl": "string",
  • "isUserBind": true,
  • "ldapBindDN": "string",
  • "ldapBindDNPassword": "string",
  • "ldapSearchFilter": "string",
  • "ldapAttrMapUsername": "string",
  • "isSameUsernameTreatedAsIdenticalUser": true,
  • "ldapAttrMapMail": "string",
  • "ldapAttrMapName": "string",
  • "ldapGroupSearchBase": "string",
  • "ldapGroupSearchFilter": "string",
  • "ldapGroupDnProperty": "string"
}

Update OpenID Connect setting

Update OpenID Connect setting

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
required
oidcProviderName
string

provider name for oidc

oidcIssuerHost
string

issuer host for oidc

oidcAuthorizationEndpoint
string

authorization endpoint for oidc

oidcTokenEndpoint
string

token endpoint for oidc

oidcRevocationEndpoint
string

revocation endpoint for oidc

oidcIntrospectionEndpoint
string

introspection endpoint for oidc

oidcUserInfoEndpoint
string

userinfo endpoint for oidc

oidcEndSessionEndpoint
string

end session endpoint for oidc

oidcRegistrationEndpoint
string

registration endpoint for oidc

oidcJWKSUri
string

JSON Web Key Set URI for oidc

oidcClientId
string

client id for oidc

oidcClientSecret
string

client secret for oidc

oidcAttrMapId
string

attr map id for oidc

oidcAttrMapUserName
string

attr map username for oidc

oidcAttrMapName
string

attr map name for oidc

oidcAttrMapMail
string

attr map mail for oidc

isSameUsernameTreatedAsIdenticalUser
boolean

local account automatically linked the user name matched

isSameEmailTreatedAsIdenticalUser
boolean

local account automatically linked the email matched

    • "isIndentSizeForced": true,
    • "isEnabledXss": true,
    • "xssOption": 0,
    • "tagWhitelist": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "attrWhitelist": "string"
    }
}

/import

import a collection from a zipped json

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
required
fileName
string

the file name of zip file

collections
Array of strings

collection names to import

object

the array of importing option that have collection name as the key

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/import

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

  • "fileName": "string",

    • "string"
    ],

    • "property1": [
      • {
        • "mode": "insert"
        }
      ],
    • "property2": [
      • {
        • "mode": "insert"
        }
      ]
    }
}

api_key

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ok": true,
  • "status": {
    • "zipFileStats": [
      • {
        • "meta": {
          • "version": "string",
          • "url": "string",
          • "passwordSeed": "string",
          • "exportedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "envVars": {
            • "property1": "string",
            • "property2": "string"
            }
          },
        • "fileName": "string",
        • "zipFilePath": "string",
        • "fileStat": {
          • "dev": 0,
          • "mode": 0,
          • "nlink": 0,
          • "uid": 0,
          • "gid": 0,
          • "rdev": 0,
          • "blksize": 0,
          • "ino": 0,
          • "size": 0,
          • "blocks": 0,
          • "atime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "mtime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "ctime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "birthtime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
          },
        • "innerFileStats": [
          • {
            • "fileName": "string",
            • "collectionName": "string",
            • "meta": null
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
    • "isExporting": true,
    • "progressList": [
      • "string"
      ]
    }
}

Request Body schema: application/json
required
isEnabled
boolean

is notification enabled

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "info": { }
}

/search/indices

Operate indices

Authorizations:
api_key
Request Body schema: application/json
required
operation
string
Enum: "normalize" "rebuild"

Operation type against to indices > * normalize - Normalize indices * rebuild - Rebuild indices

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/search/indices

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "operation": "normalize"
}

api_key

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/search/connection

Request Body schema: application/json
required
object

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/installer

Content type
application/json
{
  • "registerForm": {
    • "name": "string",

    • "email": "string",
    • "password": "string",
    • "app:globalLang": "en_US"

Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "Installation completed (Logged in as an admin user)"
}

Healthcheck

/healthcheck

Check whether the server is healthy or not

Authorizations:
api_key
query Parameters
checkServices
Array of strings
Items Enum: "mongo" "search"

The list of services to check health

strictly
boolean

Check services and responds 503 if either of these is unhealthy

Responses

https://demo.growi.org/_api/v3/healthcheck

Response samples

  • 200
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "info": {
    • "mongo": "OK",
    • "searchInfo": {
      • "esVersion": "6.6.1",
      • "esNodeInfos": {
        • "6pnILIqFT_Cjbs4mwQfcmA": {
          • "name": "6pnILIq",
          • "version": "6.6.1",
          • "plugins": [
            • {
              • "name": "analysis-icu",
              • "version": "6.6.1"
              },
            • {
              • "name": "analysis-kuromoji",
              • "version": "6.6.1"
              },
            • {
              • "name": "ingest-geoip",
              • "version": "6.6.1"
              },
            • {
              • "name": "ingest-user-agent",
              • "version": "6.6.1"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    }
}
